name: sgs/modal
title: SGS Modal
description: Trigger button that opens a modal overlay with any content inside. Fully accessible with focus trap and keyboard navigation.

trigger.label: Trigger button
trigger._note: triggerColour/triggerBackground resolve via the default {prefix}{suffix} convention (Colour/Background suffixes). Rendered as a scoped rule `.uid .sgs-modal__trigger{...}` (render.php:37-43,73-75), not inline.

dialog.label: Dialog
dialog._note: This block declares containerMirror:false (does NOT wrap SGS_Container_Wrapper) and disables native color support entirely — every declaration is block-private, scoped via render.php:37-79. maxWidth resolves via the bare-prefix default convention (case-insensitive `MaxWidth` -> `maxWidth`, render.php:21,95); modalBackground is mapped explicitly since the bare prefix + Background/Bg suffixes do not match its 'modal' name segment.

backdrop.label: Backdrop / overlay
backdrop._note: overlayColour/overlayOpacity drive `--sgs-modal-backdrop-colour`/`--sgs-modal-backdrop-opacity` custom-property VALUES on the wrapper (render.php:54-66), allowed inline per contract §A since they are variable values, not real property declarations. Mapped explicitly — overlayColour doesn't carry a Colour/BackgroundColour suffix match under the default convention.
